display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
定理 3.2 Data-Application Coupling
数据-应用复用独立条件

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
M.3 Hierarchy Non-Reduction
层次不可约

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
S.4 Abstraction Layering
抽象分层

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
E.3 Contextual Fitness
上下文适配性

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
E.2 Cost-Benefit Threshold
成本-收益阈值

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P1
数据访问应通过抽象数据服务而非直接存储耦合

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 直接存储耦合使数据复用依赖具体应用实现

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P2
微服务的价值依赖独立部署与数据隔离

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 共享数据库导致分布式单体，失去独立演进能力

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P3
服务网格实现通信模式复用而业务零侵入

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: mTLS/熔断/重试下沉为平台能力

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P4
模块化单体是多数团队的 2026 务实默认

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 80% 微服务收益，20% 成本；保留提取路径

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P5
Serverless 适用于突发/稀疏工作负载

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 按调用计费 + 自动扩缩容匹配不确定流量

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P6
架构模式选择必须匹配团队沟通边界

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 康威定律：架构边界与组织沟通边界对齐
